tasks.subject: Task 1: Widen nextScheduledNight for pre-picked films
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A future night with a film attached still counts as the next scheduled night; only a past night, or today's night once it has a film, is excluded.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/nights.ts`
- Test: `mobile/lib/nights.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nights.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/nights.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nights.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["strictly-future counts with or without film", "today counts only when film-less", "past excluded; soonest returned; empty null"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: NightView — unified adaptive night terminal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One presentational component rendering any night — film hero when set, date hero + countdown when not — with picker, attendees, Done + film action. Replaces ScheduledStep/RecordedStep.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/components/night/NightView.tsx`
- Modify: `mobile/components/night/index.ts`

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/night/NightView.tsx", "mobile/components/night/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["film hero + Scheduled/Recorded badge by date", "date hero when no film", "countdown for future; picker+attendees; Done + film action", "theme tokens only"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Make PickStep skippable and date-aware
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PickStep can be entered for a future night with a skip and date-appropriate copy, without changing tonight behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/components/night/PickStep.tsx`

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/night/PickStep.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["optional future + onSkip props", "date-aware picking tag", "skip footer only when onSkip provided", "unchanged when neither prop passed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: UpNextCard surfaces a pre-picked film
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When a scheduled night already has a film, the home card shows the film title instead of "Chooses the film that night".

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/components/UpNextCard.tsx`

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/UpNextCard.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["film title shown when movie set (sans)", "existing tag when movie null", "theme tokens only"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Flip wizard to Pick-always + unified NightView terminal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Collapse the two terminal steps to one `"night"` step rendering NightView; Who always → Pick; Pick can skip; date-first helpers keep a future night-with-film scheduled and resumable.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/nightFlow.ts`, `mobile/lib/nightFlow.test.ts`, `mobile/app/night/new.tsx`, `mobile/components/night/WhoStep.tsx`, `mobile/components/night/index.ts`
- Delete: `mobile/components/night/ScheduledStep.tsx`, `mobile/components/night/RecordedStep.tsx`

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/nightFlow.ts", "mobile/lib/nightFlow.test.ts", "mobile/app/night/new.tsx", "mobile/components/night/WhoStep.tsx", "mobile/components/night/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Step union + date-first deriveInitialStep/isResumable", "onAdvance->pick, onAttach->night, skip->night, film action->pick", "uniform Who footer", "old terminals deleted + unexported"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
